name: Jamaican Fruit Lamb Chops
recipeIngredient: 1 can Sliced peaches or apricots (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the meat over high heat until desired doneness is reached. Remove and keep warm.
2. Drain the liquid from the canned fruit in the skillet.
3. Add the instant coffee crystals to the skillet.
4. Cook over high heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the liquid reduces and thickens.
5. Return the meat to the skillet.
6. Simmer the mixture, covered, for 8 to 10 minutes, turning the chops frequently.
7. Stir in the chopped parsley and pepper.
8. Cover the skillet and continue cooking until heated through, about 5 more minutes.
9. Serve the lamb chops hot.
